'''tachovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachwhip|coachwhip]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachwhip|coachwhip]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tachovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæcheveth|tæcheveth]] || [[word:tæchevej|tæchevej]] || [[word:tæchevesh|tæchevesh]] || [[word:tæcheve|tæcheve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tachochovoth|tachochovoth]] || [[word:tachochovoj|tachochovoj]] || [[word:tachochovosh|tachochovosh]] || [[word:tachochovo|tachochovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tachovoth|tachovoth]] || [[word:tachovoj|tachovoj]] || [[word:tachovosh|tachovosh]] || [[word:tachovo|tachovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tachofvoth|tachofvoth]] || [[word:tachofvoj|tachofvoj]] || [[word:tachofvosh|tachofvosh]] || [[word:tachofvof|tachofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tachovotho|tachovotho]] || [[word:tachovojo|tachovojo]] || [[word:tachovosho|tachovosho]] || [[word:tachovoko|tachovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tachovoth|tachovoth]] || [[word:tachovoj|tachovoj]] || [[word:tachovosh|tachovosh]] || [[word:tachovo|tachovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tachovothol|tachovothol]] || [[word:tachovojol|tachovojol]] || [[word:tachovoshol|tachovoshol]] || [[word:tachovokol|tachovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tachovothotho|tachovothotho]] || [[word:tachovojojo|tachovojojo]] || [[word:tachovoshosho|tachovoshosho]] || [[word:tachovoko|tachovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tachovothon|tachovothon]] || [[word:tachovojon|tachovojon]] || [[word:tachovoshon|tachovoshon]] || [[word:tachovokon|tachovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tachovothoro|tachovothoro]] || [[word:tachovojoro|tachovojoro]] || [[word:tachovoshoro|tachovoshoro]] || [[word:tachovokoro|tachovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
